sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id Int32, date_col Date32);
INSERT INTO test_dates (id, date_col) VALUES (1, toDate32OrNull('2023-05-01'));
UPDATE test_dates SET date_col = toDate32OrNull('invalid-date') WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, date_col, toDate32OrNull('2023-12-31') AS valid_date FROM test_dates;
SELECT id, date_col, toDate32OrNull(NULL) AS null_date FROM test_dates;
